643b8c671bdcc57729e63007.leadin: He described the bodies of drowned puppies and dead cats flowing through a downhill street in "A Description of a City Shower." FTPE:
643b8c671bdcc57729e63007.leadin_sanitized: He described the bodies of drowned puppies and dead cats flowing through a downhill street in "A Description of a City Shower." FTPE:
parts: Name this author of "The Beasts' Confession" whose poems were collected in Cadenus and Vanessa.
In this Swift poem, Strephon's idealized picture of a woman he loves is dashed when, in the course of snooping around the title location, he discovers that "Celia, Celia, Celia shits!"
Celia also names the object of the affection of this author of Volpone who in a poem to her asks that she "Drink to me only with thine eyes."
